steps.title: Follow the narrator's claim
steps.content: The narrator says there is a chance she will make the basketball team, then explains why: she is quick, wiry, tough, and can dodge under others to grab the ball.

steps.title: Reject other purposes
steps.content: Choice A invents a comparison with other sports. Choice B turns the passage into instructions, though no rules are taught. Choice C says the passage gives selection criteria, but no process for choosing players is described. The answer is D.
